# Gabriel Ceicoschi — gceico.me

> Personal site of Gabriel Ceicoschi: Senior Software Engineer, AI-agent builder, and AI-workshop instructor based in Tilburg, Netherlands. Blog, portfolio, and CV.

## Who is Gabriel Ceicoschi

Gabriel Ceicoschi is a Senior Software Engineer at CM.com, where he works on HALO — CM.com's platform for building AI agents and automation solutions — focusing on making AI accessible through user experience, privacy, and security (retrieval-augmented generation and agentic workflows). He is also the founder of Aibl.to, running hands-on AI workshops where teams in the Netherlands build AI agents on their real workflows (300+ professionals trained across 20+ companies, including ASML and LocHal Tilburg). He started as a programmer, moved into UI/UX design, and now builds AI agents. Based in Tilburg, Netherlands.

## Site sections

- Home (https://gceico.me/): intro, latest posts, portfolio, and CV.
- Posts (https://gceico.me/posts): all blog articles.
- Portfolio: selected projects (Aibl.to AI workshops, "Claude, make it rain" Claude Code spend tracker, Time tracker and CRM, App landing page, Football blog).
- CV: education, experience, skills, and tools.

## Posts

- How to sketch anything? — https://gceico.me/posts/how-to-sketch-anything
- How I made a blog during Covid-19 Quarantine? — https://gceico.me/posts/how-i-made-a-blog-during-covid-19-quarantine

## Projects and tools

- claude-make-it-rain — open-source Claude Code spend tracker: https://github.com/gceico/claude-make-it-rain
- departijwijzer.nl — Dutch political-information chatbot (RAG over party manifestos), co-built with Hugo de Vries.
